title: Lucky Enchants
description: Every block you break can randomly enchant your tool with absurd levels. Highly configurable, lightweight, and pure chaos!
body:
Lucky Enchant adds a simple but addictive mechanic to Minecraft:

Breaking blocks has a chance to randomly enchant the item in your main hand.

No XP tables.
No enchantment setup.
Just play — and let chaos happen.

- Features:

Random enchantments when breaking blocks
Enchantment levels can go far beyond vanilla limits

- Fully configurable:

Enchantment chance per block
Minimum & maximum enchantment level
Maximum enchantments per item

Lightweight & performant
Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
Server-side logic (no client mods required for gameplay)

- Configuration:

Lucky Enchant includes a config file where you can control:

1. How often enchantments occur
2. How powerful enchantments can be
3. How many enchantments an item can hold

Perfect for:
Hardcore worlds,
Chaos survival,
Modpacks &
SMPs
